case_title: SHULAMIT GLAUBACH MD VS. BOBBY RAY WYSINGER JR

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF OCT-05-2012 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF GLAUBACH MD, SHULAMIT RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT WYSINGER JR, BOBBY RAY $10,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $110.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $10,110.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
REQUEST TO MAKE PAYMNENTS; FILED BY DEFENDANT WYSINGER JR, BOBBY RAY
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $10,000.00 FILED BY GLAUBACH MD, SHULAMIT AS TO DEFENDANT WYSINGER JR, BOBBY RAY ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-05-2012 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF OCT-05-2012 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF OCT-05-2012 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCES BY BOTH PARTIES. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)

ORDER (SC-222) GRANTING JUDGMENT DEBTOR'S REQUEST TO MAKE PAYMENTS (SC-220). THE COURT ORDERS THAT PAYMENTS OF $300.00 BE MADE ON THE FIRST DAY OF EVERY MONTH STARTING DEC-01-2012 UNTIL SEP-01-2015 WHEN THE FINAL PAYMENT SHALL BE $211.22. TOTAL AMOUNT OF PAYMENTS IS $10,110.00
